tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Mar 31 05:43:25UploadTech house, A heavy, saturated kick drum drives the rhythm at 126 BPM in 4/4 time, A syncopated, percussive synth bassline with a short decay follows the kick pattern, High-frequency white noise risers and filtered synth sweeps create transitions, A repetitive, processed vocal chop is layered with a short delay and heavy compression, Shakers and a crisp open hi-hat emphasize the off-beats, A resonant, acid-style synth lead with automated filter cutoff appears in short rhythmic bursts, The track is in the key of G minor2PublishRemix
